channel.title: Go Humble! RSS Books
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle books bundles!

item.title: The Complete AWS and AI Certification Book Bundle
item.description: Become an AWS all-star
item.content:encoded: Learn the skills and techniques you need to ace your AWS and AI certification exams with a curated bundle of first-time Humble Bundle exclusive learning books from the pros at Mammoth Club! Pay what you want for expert-led books like AWS Certified Generative AI Developer - Professional with Practice Exam, AWS Solutions Architect - Professional with Practice Exam, AWS Certified AI Practitioner with Practice Exam, and more! Take your career prospects to the next level, and help support the American Cancer Society with your purchase!

item.title: Magpie Games Classic Indie RPG Physical Book Bundle
item.description: Gather your friends and save the world!
item.content:encoded:
Got a table at home that’s looking a little empty? Why not fill it with stacks of fantastic roleplaying books—available as physical copies in this bundle from Magpie Games! Get a group together and play through fan-favorite plotlines like The Play’s The Thing, an adventure that lets you retell and remix Shakespeare’s greatest works! Or dive into Our Last Best Hope, which sets high-octane thrills within end-of-the-world plots like Sunshine and Armageddon! Grow some wings and solve the mysteries of a world in peril in Epyllion: A Dragon Epic! This bundle includes physical copies and expansions for all these great adventures, so grab them now at the price of your choosing and support ACLU with your purchase!

Codes expire. Please use by June 30th, 2026. Items will ship by May 31, 2026.

item.title: Head First by O'Reilly
item.description: A powerhouse of programming courses
item.content:encoded: Prepare for your big coding exam with confidence with our curated bundle of learning courses on C#, Python, and beyond! O’Reilly’s brain-friendly approach to the award-winning Head First series is designed to make complex topics more approachable to newbies and beginners alike. Learn from experts within the topics of courses like Head First JavaScript Programming, Head First Software Architecture, Head First Python, and more. Rethink the way you approach knowledge growth and studying with a little help from O’Reilly, and help support Code for America with your purchase!

item.title: Yarned and Dangerous: A Knitastic Bundle by C&T
item.description: Knit just got real
item.content:encoded: Yarn jockeys, needle noggins, purl pirates, and everyone in between, this is the bundle for you! Contained within is a treasure trove of knitting literature (kniterature?) with instructions on how to make everything under the sun. Learn all the patterns you need to make a menagerie of sweet knitted creatures! Add some new stitches to your arsenal and add some pizzazz to your projects! Study the ins and outs of classic afghans, so you can blanket yourself in your own creations to your heart’s content! There is so much more included in this bundle of over 30 knitting ebooks, so grab it now at the price of your choosing, and support One Tree Planted with your purchase!

item.title: App Development Mega Bundle by Packt
item.description: Achieve new heights in app development
item.content:encoded: Nurture the skills you need to succeed in coding and app development with our latest Mega Bundle by Packt. Learn the latest techniques being used across the industry with expert-led curriculums like Agentic Coding with Claude Code, Supercharged Coding with GenAI, Flutter for Beginners, and iOS 26 Programming for Beginners. Don’t let this opportunity to sharpen your digital skill sets pass you by—pay what you want for a curated collection of learning courses today and help support the Against Malaria Foundation when you shop with Humble Bundle.

item.title: Elves & Fey 5E D&D Bundle by Kobold Press
item.description: Reimagine the material plane
item.content:encoded:
Elevate your love for Elven D&D 5e adventures with an all-new collection from the campaign magicians at Kobold Press! Highlighted by downloadable PDFs for Book of Ebon Tides and Tales from the Shadows, and a killer Creature Codex 5E, this bundle has everything you need to embark on a truly memorable campaign with your friends. Wage war as a powerful warlock or decimate foes as a wisdom-wielding druid, and so much more with the 25+ auxiliary resources within this epic collection. Pay what you want for the very best D&D 5e campaigns by Kobold Press and help support the Girls Make Games Scholarship Fund with your purchase!

Codes are redeemable through the DriveThruRPG website. Codes expire. Please redeem before May 30th, 2027

item.title: The No Kings Library by Berrett-Koehler
item.description: The No Kings Library
item.content:encoded: This No Kings Library collection offers insightful perspectives on the systems shaping modern society. These authors provide analysis on leadership, civic engagement, and power dynamics. Featured titles include Thom Hartmann’s study of executive authority and John Perkins’ account of global economic influence. It is a thoughtful resource for anyone looking to better understand today's institutional hierarchies. Get all 21 books and support charity!

item.title: Joe Hill: The Novels & Short Story Collections by HarperCollins
item.description: Don’t read these with the lights off
item.content:encoded:
One of horror’s modern masters stars in our latest book bundle celebrating the hair-raising works of Joe Hill! This collection from HarperCollins includes the author’s nefarious novels and spine-chilling short stories to give you a lifetime’s worth of sleepless nights. Follow a man beset by unspeakable tragedy who wakes up one morning to find horns growing out of his skull and hellish powers at his command in Horns! Kick things into maximum overdrive with the chilling short story collection Full Throttle! Immerse yourself in the post-apocalyptic and dark fantasy environments conjured by the four novellas that make up Strange Weather! There’s a lot more to explore in this bundle if you dare, so grab it now at the price of your choosing, and support SELT with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before May 20th, 2027.

item.title: Mercedes Lackey: Valdemar and Beyond by DAW Books
item.description: Explore the worlds of a fantasy legend
item.content:encoded: If you’re a fantasy fan, you’ve probably heard of Mercedes Lackey, one of the most prolific and influential voices in the sci-fi/fantasy arena. If you’ve always meant to pick up one of her books but never got around to it, or if you’ve read a little of her work and are dying for more, we’ve got an ebook bundle full to the brim of Lackey’s biggest and best, from her bestselling Valdemar saga and beyond! Dive into the Kingdom of Valdemar with the first entry in the series, the magical adventure Arrows of the Queen. Reawaken the lost magic of the land in Winds of Fate. Solve the mystery of a young mage-in-training’s secret past in the dark academia adventure Intrigues. There are 37 books in total to explore in this bundle, so get it now for the price of your choice, and ALA’s Freedom to Read Foundation with your purchase!

item.title: C# and .NET Mega Bundle 2026 by Packt
item.description: Modern C# and .NET with added depth from C based languages
item.content:encoded: We partnered with Packt experts to bring you a finely tuned C# and .NET Mega Bundle built for modern developers. Master object-oriented development with practical, easy-to-follow titles like C# 14 and .NET 10: Modern Cross-Platform Development Fundamentals and Microservices Design Patterns in .NET. This curated collection also includes select titles from the broader C-Based Languages, introducing systems-level and performance-oriented concepts to deepen your engineering perspective. Ideal for intermediate and experienced developers looking to grow their careers. Plus, a portion of your purchase supports charity: water.

item.title: C# and .NET Mega Bundle 2026 by Packt
item.description: Modern C# and .NET with added depth from C based languages
item.content:encoded: We partnered with Packt experts to bring you a finely tuned C# and .NET Mega Bundle built for modern developers. Master object-oriented development with practical, easy-to-follow titles like C# 14 and .NET 10: Modern Cross-Platform Development Fundamentals and Microservices Design Patterns in .NET. This curated collection also includes select titles from the broader C-Based Languages, introducing systems-level and performance-oriented concepts to deepen your engineering perspective. Ideal for intermediate and experienced developers looking to grow their careers. Plus, a portion of your purchase supports charity: water.

item.title: Shells and Scripting for Seasoned Admins by O'Reilly ENCORE
item.description: Shells and scripting for seasoned admins
item.content:encoded: Level up your coding skills with this bundle of ebooks! Learn PowerShell, scripting, Linux, and more with this library of 10+ courses from O’Reilly. Programs like Efficient Linux at the Command Line: Boost Your Command-Line Skills, Learning the Bash Shell: Unix Shell Programming, and Efficient Linux at the Command Line: Boost Your Command-Line Skills are great for novice coders and seasoned pros alike. Get this amazing bundle and help support Code for America with your purchase.

item.title: The Best of Humble Bundle: The Complete Terry Moore by Abstract Studios
item.description: Tales of love, murder, and hi-tech battle suits
item.content:encoded: Discover some of comics’ most indelible characters in the universe of Eisner Award–winning artist & writer Terry Moore! Get caught up in the lives of Katchoo, Francine, and David in the complete run of the groundbreaking series Strangers in Paradise. Meet Julie, whose life changes forever when liquid metal rains from the sky in Echo. Unravel the mystery of a woman who wakes up in her own grave in Rachel Rising. Plus, your purchase helps support World Central Kitchen!

item.title: Battlezoo Ultimate Monster & Adventure Bundle for D&D 5E
item.description: Animal adventures await
item.content:encoded:
We’ve teamed up with Roll for Combat to curate the ultimate VTT Bundle to spice up your next game night. Uncover long-forgotten secrets, save a colossal Progenitor, and face eldritch powers beneath the waves in Battlezoo Adventures, a cinematic level 5 adventure for D&D 5e. This amazing collection features core rulebooks, map packs, and digital tokens, all designed to give your D&D campaigns some serious bite. Pay what you want for the best Battlezoo Adventures collection around and help support Canine Companions with your purchase—release the Kraken before it’s too late!

Keys expire. Please redeem before December 31st, 2026

item.title: BEST OF HUMBLE BUNDLE: Raspberry Pi and Retro Gaming by Raspberry Pi Press
item.description: Sweet like Raspberry Pi
item.content:encoded: Learn the skills and knowledge you need to become a pro on Raspberry Pi with this expansive class bundle. Inside this 15 course library, you’ll get The Official Raspberry Pi Handbook 2025, Retro Gaming with Raspberry Pi, The Official Raspberry Pi Beginner's Guide, 5th Edition (2023), and more. This bundle covers the basics of Raspberry Pi in English, Spanish, German, and French! Deepen your understanding of these powerful little machines, whether you’re new to computing or a seasoned professional. Purchase the bundle and support the charity of your choice!

item.title: Godot Game Development by Zenva
item.description: Learning Godot just got easier
item.content:encoded: Get ready to build your game development skills with the all-new Godot Game Development by Zenva! This bundle offers everything you need to succeed using Godot, from beginner-friendly foundations to advanced systems, with 12 expert-led eBooks. Pay what you want for practical and approachable lessons in game design like Create a Complete Bullet Hell in Godot, Learn to Make a Farming Game in Godot, and more. Gain the tools to turn your ideas into playable, polished experiences, and help support Alzheimer’s Research UK when you shop with Humble Bundle.

item.title: Strange Romance by Image Comics
item.description: Fall in love with comics again
item.content:encoded:
The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences.

Spring has sprung and love is in the air—and it’s also in the gorgeously illustrated pages of Image Comics’ best romance series! We’ve teamed up with Image to bring you the most heartstopping, most unique, and most adventurous love stories the world of comics has to offer. Watch a man and a robot fall in love (or will they??) in the romantic science fiction drama Alex + Ada! East meets West in the swashbuckling samurai-gunslinger love story Falling in Love on the Path to Hell! A mysterious app that makes your desires a reality takes over an elite college campus in Crave! And, of course, no romance comic bundle would be complete without the greatest space opera love story of them all, Image’s bestselling series Saga! Grab these series and many more in this extremely romantic ebook bundle, and a portion of your purchase at the price of your choice supports BINC!

item.title: The Complete Dune RPG Digital Megabundle
item.description: Ride the worm to tabletop victory
item.content:encoded:
If you’ve ever wanted to see how well you’d survive Frank Herbert’s vast Dune universe—and maybe bring some of your friends along for the sandworm ride—we’ve got just the bundle of digital TTRPG resources for you! Enter Modiphius’ Dune - Adventures in the Imperium roleplaying saga with the Agents of Dune Deluxe Starter Set and the full Masters of Dune adventure. Read up on the lore with the Houses of the Landsraad and Emperor’s Court supplements. Explore the Imperium with PDF copies of exciting standalone storylines, like the Guild Heighliner murder mystery Dune: Fatal Journey and the desert-set survival challenge Dune: Coriolis Storm. We’ve also included the Gamemaster’s Toolkit and Core Rulebook to make designing your own adventures a breeze! All this and more is included in this bundle—and for those who prefer playing on an actual tabletop, a physical version is available in select regions too! All purchases at the price of your choice help support the ACLU. If you want to try riding those sandworms, though, you’re on your own.

Codes are redeemable through DriveThruRPG.

item.title: The Dune RPG Physical Megabundle by Modiphius
item.description: Ride the worm to tabletop victory
item.content:encoded:
If you’ve ever wanted to see how well you’d survive Frank Herbert’s vast Dune universe—and maybe bring some of your friends along for the sandworm ride—we’ve got just the bundle for you! (And good news for those of you who like to play your TTRPGs on actual tabletops: this bundle includes physical copies of everything listed.) Get things rolling with the Agents of Dune Deluxe Starter Set from Modiphius’ Dune - Adventures in the Imperium, which includes a complete adventure, character folios, card decks, and even a spice harvesting system. Show your loyalty to the greatest House of the Imperium with the Atreides collector’s edition of the Dune: Core Rulebook. Test your sandwalking skills with an Arrakis themed dice set. Chart the Golden Path with the Gamemaster’s Toolkit. All this and more is included when you accept your destiny and grab this bundle for the price of your choice—and for those who prefer digital copies, an all-digital version is available too! All purchases help support the ACLU. If you want to try riding those sandworms, though, you’re on your own.

Limited Quantities Available!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 30th, 2026

item.title: The Complete Dune RPG Digital Megabundle
item.description: Ride the worm to tabletop victory
item.content:encoded:
If you’ve ever wanted to see how well you’d survive Frank Herbert’s vast Dune universe—and maybe bring some of your friends along for the sandworm ride—we’ve got just the bundle of digital TTRPG resources for you! Enter Modiphius’ Dune - Adventures in the Imperium roleplaying saga with the Agents of Dune Deluxe Starter Set and the full Masters of Dune adventure. Read up on the lore with the Houses of the Landsraad and Emperor’s Court supplements. Explore the Imperium with PDF copies of exciting standalone storylines, like the Guild Heighliner murder mystery Dune: Fatal Journey and the desert-set survival challenge Dune: Coriolis Storm. We’ve also included the Gamemaster’s Toolkit and Core Rulebook to make designing your own adventures a breeze! All this and more is included in this bundle—and for those who prefer playing on an actual tabletop, a physical version is available in select regions too! All purchases at the price of your choice help support the ACLU. If you want to try riding those sandworms, though, you’re on your own.

Codes are redeemable through DriveThruRPG.

item.title: The Collected Peanuts by Fantagraphics
item.description: All of Peanuts in one place?? Good grief!
item.content:encoded: Put on your zigzag t-shirt and grab your football, because we’ve collected every Peanuts comic book and strip into one bundle courtesy of Fantagraphics! This bundle of Peanuts books includes The Complete Peanuts spanning 1953 to 2000, the omnibus series of recolored classic strips Peanuts Every Sunday, the Peanuts Game Day Collection of comics for the sports fan in your life, collected strips like Snoopy vs. the Red Baron, and graphic novels like Batter Up, Charlie Brown! Get all the Peanuts your heart desires in one bundle—and, most importantly, every purchase at the price of your choice helps people in need find their Snoopy by supporting Canine Companions!
